message:
So, the other day, I decided it was finally time to organize my emergency kit. You know, the one I've been meaning to tackle since forever? Well, I got all my supplies out and was feeling pretty proud of myself. That’s when my dog, Max, decided to make it his personal playground. He grabbed a roll of duct tape and started running around like a lunatic, with me chasing after him trying not to trip over the flashlights and batteries scattered everywhere. 

In the midst of the chaos, I realized that preparedness is not just about having supplies; it’s also about being ready for the unexpected—like a playful pup who thinks duct tape is a toy! 

After a good laugh (and a little bit of cleanup), I made a note to keep my emergency kit in a better spot. Sometimes, the comedy of NOT being ready teaches us the best lessons. Has anything unexpected happened to you while trying to get organized?
